sample_design: 12 rows stratified across categories and access risk; official source pages manually checked; field-level comparison, not a claim about all 100 rows

records.review_note: OAuth2 connected apps are required for the REST integration; org/admin setup remains the install gate.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: HubSpot documents OAuth for distributed apps and private access tokens for account-scoped integrations.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Zendesk supports OAuth access tokens and API tokens; distributed apps need global OAuth and admin-scoped setup.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Slack's Web API is authenticated through OAuth tokens, with workspace installation and scopes determining access.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Cloud API access uses Meta tokens and business/app/phone setup; verification and review are real gates.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: OAuth is paired with a developer token whose access level controls production capability and may require review.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Shopify documents OAuth/token exchange for merchant installs; scopes and distribution determine the build path.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Ahrefs requires a bearer API key, and key creation/API usage is owner/admin and paid-plan constrained.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: GitHub supports PATs, GitHub App tokens and OAuth; permissions are endpoint-specific and self-serve.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Notion supports internal static tokens and public OAuth; pages must be explicitly shared with the connection.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: Stripe uses API keys, with test-mode keys self-serve and live-mode access subject to account verification.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

records.review_note: The public site exposes product/research positioning but no clearly documented general-purpose self-serve API path; route to sales.
records.review_method: Official source page manually checked against the four decision fields

limitations: The 12-row check is directional and intentionally not presented as statistically representative.
A live URL probe confirms reachability only; it cannot prove auth or commercial policy.
Rows with human_follow_up=true remain the next review queue before production toolkit sourcing.
